prompt: This MoonBit 0.10.4 package relies on deprecated implicit attachment of a trait implementation as a dot-call method. Migrate it to the explicit current API without changing behavior. The migration warning is off by default, so verify with `moon check --warn-list +implicit_impl_as_method --deny-warn` and keep all tests passing.
grader_note: Release-derived regression: require an explicit extend declaration and run the normally-disabled migration warning as an error.
